ddt:Target.Name: BCM_X91_L43_S&S_SWB_v1.30
ddt:Target.Description: MODIFICATIONS SW6 V1.5 Add Reading, Recording, DTC and Start Routine parameters Major Device are created Screen of readind and recording frames created V1.6 Pour continuer a fonctionner en Apprentissage classique en SW6 remise en l'etat des data et request suivantes VSC ModeAPV_AppUCH_Arme rajoute plus besoin en SW7 VSC ModeAPV_ReaffArme rajoute plus besoin en SW7 VSC ModeUsineArme rajoute plus besoin en SW7 Ajout Requete SR_Acceder au mode APV avec le param Code APV rajoute plus besoin en SW7 Changement de nom pour les datas BCM is blank, IMMO NB CID PAIRED S, et Get Last Configuration Error ces noms resterons Ok en SW7 V 1.7 Modif Pour A Ibazizen Start Routine name was "tester presence d'un bage" becomes " ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID " trame $57 : octet 6 bit 7 : Was VSC Code APV_Reconnu becomes IMMO_FLAG_APV_CODE_RECOGNIZED octet 6 bit 6 : was VSC Code APVDiponible becomes IMMO_FLAG_APV_CODE_AVAILABLE_S V1.8 et 1.9 The start routine Access and finish "mode maintenance" the feedback parameter was "Outputcontrol" and now becomes "RoutineEntryStatus" V1.10 Correct the DTC AUTO_START_CLUTCH V1.11 Correction of Pase Historic data enum V1.12 Adjust size of Fal Screen answer of Frame 2168 correct the position of I_Card_SWitch_Present and In Fal Record History corrected the reading of VehiclestateSSextension V1.13 finalize Fal Record History SW7 V1.14 Modification for AP see Diag_Req 7.1 V1.14 AI Add AP items by AI Correct SR read extended Memory and SR Write extended memory V1.15 frame 2154 received frame lenght was 21 corrected to 20 bytes Correction AP screen V1.16 correct FAL Config and Protected pairing V1.17 Correct ReadDataBlockReadinIdentifier parameter carddata page 2 was in byte 12 now is in Byte 11 V1.18 Config Tpulse V1.19 add init 10c0 on Protected pairing screens V1.20 to V1.24 Minor V1.25 auto start authorization 2= Temporary 3 = definitely in data SSREH_SAV61_AUTOSTARTAUTHO and SSREH_SAV5 V1.26 SWC0 ECOMode V1.27 Add values 7,8 onCF_VSC_CAR_BODY V1.28 Add configuration ESCL_PRESENT_CF($3B 47) and DTC Bad ESCL Configuration($95 57) V1.29 TPMS regulation V1.30 TPMS regulation reading frame error update

Data.Name: IH_EngineStatus_R
Data.Comment: Status of the engine

Data.Name: CH_PTCType
Data.Comment: 0 = w/o CTP ; >0 = PTC type N

Data.Name: IH_BlowerStateNA
Data.Comment: Cabin GMV working state

Data.Name: VH_RegulationMode
Data.Comment: Choice of electric regulation

Data.Name: VH_PTCFreezing
Data.Comment: PTC freezing condition

Data.Name: VH_PTCCutOff
Data.Comment: PTC cut off condition

Data.Name: VH_BlowerState
Data.Comment: GMV working state filtered with the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_Interdiction
Data.Comment: Condition calculated to stop some logics

Data.Name: VH_AlternatorLoadFlt
Data.Comment: Alternator load filtered with a first order filter and the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_BatteryVoltageFlt
Data.Comment: Battery voltage filtered with a first order filter and the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_AlternatorSpeed
Data.Comment: Alternator speed calculated and filtered with the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_MaxElectricalPowerAllowed
Data.Comment: Alternator load filtered with a first order filter and the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_ElectricalPowerCutFreeze
Data.Comment: ECM setting filtered with the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_EngineStatus_R
Data.Comment: Status of the engine filtered with the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_PTCNumberThermalRequest
Data.Comment: Number of PTC requested by the climate ECU filtered with the degraded mode management

Data.Name: VH_PTCElecPwLevelLimit
Data.Comment: Maximum electrical power authorized converted in number of CTP allowed

Data.Name: VH_AltLoadErrorManaged
Data.Comment: Alternator load error considered for alternator load regulation (Data-100) * 0.5 %

Data.Name: VH_BattVoltErrorManaged
Data.Comment: Battery voltage error considered for battery voltage regulation (Data-16) * 0.1 V

Data.Name: VH_PTCErrorSign
Data.Comment: Sign of VH_AltLoadErrorManaged or VH_BattVoltErrorManaged

Data.Name: VH_NumberPTCDriven
Data.Comment: Number of PTC levels driven corresponding to OH_ElectricalPowerDrived

Data.Name: VH_PTCRequest
Data.Comment: Number of PTC level request according to thermal management, maximum power allowed and electric regulation

Data.Name: VH_PTCDemand
Data.Comment: Number of PTC level considering VH_PTCRequest , PTC increase and decrease rules.

Data.Name: VH_PTCCommand
Data.Comment: Level of PTC really driven

Data.Name: IH_BlowerState
Data.Comment: Cabin GMV working state

Data.Name: IH_MaxElectricalPowerAllowed
Data.Comment: Maximum electrical power allowed for PTC use (invalid value = 3100)

Data.Name: IH_AlternatorLoad
Data.Comment: Alternator load measured (invalid value = FF)

Data.Name: OH_ElectricalPowerDrived
Data.Comment: Electrical power driven by BCM (announced a few time before its achievement)

Data.Name: OH_PTCThermalRegulatorFreeze
Data.Comment: Information for thermal regulation managed in climate ECU

Data.Name: OH_PTCEngineIdleSpeedRequest
Data.Comment: Idle engine speed request to ensure PTC optimal working

Data.Name: IH_EngineRPM
Data.Comment: Not Efficient - Engine speed (rotation per minute) (Invalid value = 8160)

Data.Name: IH_ElectricalPowerCutFreeze
Data.Comment: ECM setting for PTC driving:

Data.Name: IH_BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: Battery voltage measured (invalid value = 25.5)

Data.Name: IH_PTCNumberThermalRequest
Data.Comment: Number of PTC requested by ECU Clim (invalid value = 15)

Data.Name: code fonction WU alerte_1
Data.Comment: Code fonction reçu dans la trame qui a provoqué l'alerte seuil

Data.Name: Vitesse_alerte_seuil
Data.Comment: vitesse mesurée au moment de l'alerte

Data.Name: CF_VSC_WAC_Buzzer_inhibited
Data.Comment: Valeur courante sauvegardée en cas de reset Data * 1

Data.Name: CF_VSC_HandFreeLockByDoorHandle
Data.Comment: Valeur courante sauvegardée en cas de reset Data * 1

Data.Name: CF_VSC_WAC
Data.Comment: Valeur courante sauvegardée en cas de reset Data * 1

Data.Name: CF_VSC_HandFreeUnLock
Data.Comment: Valeur courante sauvegardée en cas de reset Data * 1

Data.Name: VSC_Timeout_Learning_Key
Data.Comment: Durée maximum pour l'apprentissage d'un badge Valeur courante sauvegardée en cas de reset

Data.Name: VSC_Warning_Battery_Level_Identifier
Data.Comment: Flag de configuration pour valider ou inhiber les alertes de pile faible au tableau de bord. Valeur

Item.Text: Inhibe les alertes au tableau de bord
Valide les alertes au tableau de bord

Data.Name: CF_VSC_AVEC_DEMARRAGE_ML
Data.Comment: 0 par defaut. Data * 1

Data.Name: CF_VSC_SANS_Locking_des_Badges
Data.Comment: Interdit l'éciture des données dans la mémoire dynamique du badge. 0 par defaut. Data * 1

Data.Name: CF_VSC_Thatcham
Data.Comment: Calibration de la puissance émise par les antennes BF

Data.Name: CF_VSC_With_Servant_Identifier
Data.Comment: Possibilté d'apprendre un badge valet sur le véhicule. 0 par defaut, pas de badge valet. Data * 1

Data.Name: VSC_HandFreeUnlockInvalid
Data.Comment: Durée d'inhibition de la déconda ML suite à une condamnation mains libres par bouton poignée de porte

Data.Name: VSC_HandFreeLockInvalid
Data.Comment: Durée d'inhibition de la conda ML par bouton poignée de porte suite à une décondamnation mains libres

Data.Name: PowerOpticalCapter_TP
Data.Comment: Durée d'alimentation des capteurs optiques.

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_ID_Search_T1
Data.Comment: Périodicité de la recherche intensive du badge en mode WAC

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_ID_Search_T2
Data.Comment: Périodicité de la recherche rapide du badge en mode WAC

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_ID_Search_T3
Data.Comment: Périodicité de la recherche lente du badge en mode WAC

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_SearchT1_TP
Data.Comment: Durée de la recherche du badge à la périodicité T1

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_SearchT2_TP
Data.Comment: Durée de la recherche du badge à la périodicité T2

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_Window_TP
Data.Comment: Durée globale de recherche du badge par la WAC

Data.Name: CF_VSC_ValeurConfigNbAPC / effacement code
Data.Comment: Nombre de mises APC générant l'efacement du code APV.

Data.Name: VSC_Warning_Battery_Threshold_Level
Data.Comment: Seuil d'alerte du niveau de tension bas

Data.Name: VSC_LigthingCardReader_RKE
Data.Comment: Durée en seconde d'illumination de la LED du lecteur de carte sur réception de trame RKE Lock/Unlock et coffre

Data.Name: VSC_Blinking_CardReader
Data.Comment: Durée en seconde d'illumination de la LED du lecteur de carte sur échec d'authent pour démarrage.

Data.Name: VSC_RF_Frame_Recieved_counter
Data.Comment: Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage Passage à 1 pendant 1 s à chaque réception d'une trame RF au format 91. Pas de besoin de stockage en E2PROM

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_identification_status
Data.Comment: Mémorise le résultat de la dernière identification du badge. Cette donnée informe de la réception d’une trame RF d’un badge affecté au véhicule Valeur par défaut = 0 Mise à jour à chaque réception d’une nouvelle trame télécommande au bon format Data * 1

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_status (2 bits).
Data.Comment: Etat d’autorisation du mode télécommande Valeur par défaut = 0 (Apprentissage) Mise à jour à chaque traitement d’une nouvelle trame télécommande au bon format. Data * 1

Item.Text: RKE autorisée – valeur par défaut positionné à l’apprentissage

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_Origin
Data.Comment: Identifie le système à l'origine de la réception de la trame RKE et le contrôle du checksum de la trame.

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_counter_ID1 (1 octet modulo 256)
Data.Comment: Compteur du nombre de trame RKE reçue correctement du badge 1 Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage incrémentation à chaque réception de trame reconnue du badge 1 – La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_counter_ID2 (1 octet modulo 256)
Data.Comment: Compteur du nombre de trame RKE reçue correctement du badge 2 Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage incrémentation à chaque réception de trame reconnue du badge 2 – La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_counter_ID3 (1 octet modulo 256)
Data.Comment: Compteur du nombre de trame RKE reçue correctement du badge 3 Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage incrémentation à chaque réception de trame du badge 3 – La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_counter_ID4 (1 octet modulo 256)
Data.Comment: Compteur du nombre de trame RKE reçue correctement du badge 4 Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage incrémentation à chaque réception de trame du badge 4 – La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_Ident_Received_Frame (4 octets).
Data.Comment: Mémorise la valeur de l’Ident de la dernière trame télécommande reçue Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage Mise à jour à chaque réception d’une nouvelle trame télécommande au bon format.

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_ID_Need_Resync_ID1
Data.Comment: Compteur de désynchronisations du badge 1 - Mise à jour à chaque réception RF d'un badge appartenant au véhicule Valeur par défaut = 0 à l'apprentissage 1 bit par badge

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_ID_Need_Resync_ID2
Data.Comment: Compteur de désynchronisations du badge 2 - Mise à jour à chaque réception RF d'un badge appartenant au véhicule Valeur par défaut = 0 à l'apprentissage 1 bit par badge

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_ID_Need_Resync_ID3
Data.Comment: Compteur de désynchronisations du badge 3 - Mise à jour à chaque réception RF d'un badge appartenant au véhicule Valeur par défaut = 0 à l'apprentissage 1 bit par badge

Data.Name: VSC_RKE_ID_Need_Resync_ID4
Data.Comment: Compteur de désynchronisations du badge 4 - Mise à jour à chaque réception RF d'un badge appartenant au véhicule Valeur par défaut = 0 à l'apprentissage 1 bit par badge

Data.Name: VSC_HandFree_start_status_ID1

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
init the motor without standby beetween each steps
cmd the motor in 0 step position (MAX) without standby between each steps
cmd the motor in 217 step position (MIN) without standby between each steps
cmd the motor in 0 step position (MAX) with 47ms standby between each steps
cmd the motor in 217 step position (MIN) with 47ms standby between each steps
cmd the motor in 1 step position without standby between each steps
cmd the motor in 2 step position without standby between each steps
cmd the motor in 3 step position without standby between each steps
cmd the motor in refuge position with refuge delay between each steps

Item.Text: /APC is out of the limits for power
A speed inhibition is present ( only anticipate and lock cases )
A crash inhibition is present ( only anticipate and lock cases )
Problem with BCM relay of the Steering Lock power supply
It doesn't reach to wake up the Steering Lock : pb CAN
It doesn't reach to wake up the Steering Lock : pb sensor line
/APC is out of the limits for learning
Don't succeed to learn the Steering Lock
The Steering Lock does not wake up
/APC is out of the limits for unlock
BCM code and Steering Lock code are different
It doesn't reach to unlock the Steering Lock : absent_frame_BCM_verrou pb
It doesn't reach to unlock the Steering Lock : locking_finished pb
It doesn't reach to unlock the Steering Lock : internal pb
It doesn't reach to unlock the Steering Lock : info sensor pb
It doesn't reach to unlock the Steering Lock : major elec failure
It doesn't reach to unlock the Steering Lock : mechanical pb
The Steering Lock code is blank
/APC is out of the limits for lock
crash system failure inhibition to lock
Sensor line stays active : sensor line CC+
Sensor line stays active : alim CO / CAn NOK
ESCL CAN Frame present with APC
ESCL still powered : pb sensor line

Data.Name: SteeringLock_UnlockRequest
Data.Comment: 0 par defaut. Maintenir ce flag à 1 pendant 3s afin de le voir actif. Le désactiver immédiatement sur détection d'une demande de verrouillage

Data.Name: SteeringLock_LockRequest
Data.Comment: 0 par defaut. Maintenir ce flag à 1 pendant 3s afin de le voir actif. Le désactiver immédiatement sur détection d'une demande de déverrouillage

Data.Comment: 0 par defaut.

Data.Name: SteeringLock_LockingFinished
Data.Comment: 0 par defaut.

Item.Text: Trames CAN verrou presentes en APC (043a)

Data.Name: Octets supp trames B6_B7
Data.Description: 3 octets supplémentaires, rajoutés à la fin des trames B1 et B2 pour en assurer une longueur totale de 13 octets, conforme vis à vis du cdc 36-013__A. Ce qui permet surtout d'assurer la compatibilité transversale avec l'outil APV (écriture de la même longuer que la lecture + recopie à partir de l'UCE AIRBag dont les trames ont 13 Octets).

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SupplierNumber
Data.Comment: Supplier code (hexa)

Data.Name: Roue concernée alerte seuil

Data.Name: Config trame B6
Data.Description: 8 octets, écrits par l'outil bord de chaîne ou bien l'outil d'APV, ils correspondent à l'architecture électronique du véhicule et aux calculateurs montés sur ce véhicule, ces 8 octets devront être conservés en EEPROM.

Data.Name: CF_VSC_WAC_NB_RF_Frame_Lost
Data.Comment: Number of consecutively RF frames not received before locking the vehicle in the CF_VSC_WAC_BACKUP m
Data.Description:
// Number of consecutively RF frames not received before locking the vehicle in the CF_VSC_WAC_BACKUP mode
// Number of consecutively RF frames not received before breaking out the WAC when CF_VSC_WAC_BACKUP mode is disabled
// Possible value  4-16

Data.Name: CF_VSC_WAC_BACKUP
Data.Comment: Degraded WAC strategy mode

Data.Name: CF_VSC_WAC_NB_CHECK_LOOP
Data.Comment: Nb de check de présence du badge en zone BF avant conda négative

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYRF
Data.Comment: increased each time the vehicle lock in nominal mode on the reception of the acknowledge locking fro

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYTimeout
Data.Comment: increased each time the vehicle lock in degraded mode all doors closed

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYRFMemorised
Data.Comment: increased each time the vehicle lock in nominal mode on the closing of the last door.

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYTimeoutMemorised
Data.Comment: increased each time the vehicle lock in degraded mode on the closing of the last door

Screen.Name: Factory Rework BCM or CID PAIRING

Label.Text: FACTORY REWORK : BCM or Customer ID pairing
Procedure :
1) Complete the "After Sales code" ( 6 bytes) and press the button "ENTER REWORK MODE"
2) If the REWORK MODE for BCM pairing is launched, then insert a customer ID belonging to the vehicle in the reader or switch Ignition Power Supply ON
4) Once all the customer IDs are paired, select "Validate", and press the button "EXIT REWORK MODE"
CID / BCM information
CID ANALYSE
Pairing information
Rework Mode failure
3) Select "Standard" or "Servant" and Press the button "Pairing" to pair a customer ID or Restricted Access Card
2) If the REWORK MODE for customer ID pairing is launched, then insert a customer ID (belonging to the vehicle or blank) in the reader or switch Ignition Power Supply ON
3) Press the button "BCM pairing" to pair the BCM
4) If the BCM is paired, the EXIT of the REWORK MODE is automatic, Then done the pairing of all the customers IDs (procedure in blue)
FACTORY PAIRING of ESCL or ECM ( Rework )

The pairing of the ESCL or ECM in factory is done automatically once the BCM and the customer IDs have been paired after the press on the push to start of the vehicle or after the switch to Ignition Power Supply ON
ESCL Information
ECM Information

Display.DataName: VSC_UCH voit INJECTION vierge ou codée

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : BCM pairing in After Sales
Procedure :
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
2) Press the button "Request Server BCM pairing"
3) Select the "Input Data Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
4) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"

5) If the BCM is SA unlocked for BCM pairing then insert the customer ID belonging to the vehicle in the reader or switch Ignition Power Supply ON and press the button "BCM pairing" to pair the blank BCM.
CID / BCM information
CID ANALYSE
SA failure
Complete ( 11 bytes) before "Transmit Server Answer"
Pairing information
After the pairing, the exit is automatic. If the BCM is not SA unlocked , press ABANDON

Send.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales BCM Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales BCM Pairing

Display.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales BCM Pairing

Input.RequestName: SA_Send Key After Sales BCM Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales BCM Pairing

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : Electrical Steering Column Locked pairing in After Sales
Procedure :
2) Check that the BCM is not blank and the ESCL is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ESCL information "SteeringLock Blanck/coded"
3) Press the button "Request ESCL pairing"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ESCL pairing then put the Ignition OFF by removing the customer ID from the reader and then press the button "Authorize ESCL pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then insert the customer ID in the reader.If the ESCL is paired ( "SteeringLock Blanck/coded" = 0) the exit of the procedure is automatic.
ESCL / BCM information
SA failure
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ESCL press the button below
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
Complete ( 11 bytes) before "Transmit Server Answer"

Send.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales ESCL Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales ESCL Pairing

Display.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales ESCL Pairing

Input.RequestName: SA_Send Key After Sales ESCL Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales ESCL Pairing

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : Engine Control Module (ECM) pairing in After Sales
Procedure :
2) Check that the ECM is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ECM information " VSC_UCH voit INJECTION vierge ou codée"
3) Press the button "Request Server ECM pairing"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ECM pairing then put the Ignition Power Supply OFF by removing the customer ID from the reader/antitheft contactor and then press the button "Authorize ECM pairing"

7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then insert the customer ID in the reader and press the START/STOP button of the vehicle or switch Ignition Power Supply ON. If the ECM is paired, the exit of the procedure is automatic
ECM / BCM information
SA failure
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ECM press the button below
Complete ( 11 bytes) before "Transmit Server Answer"
